# Kilian Koch

> Kilian Koch is a doctoral researcher in mathematics at the Chair of Applied
> Analysis, RWTH Aachen University, Germany. He works on gradient flows in
> geometric analysis, in particular well-posedness and singular behaviour of
> half-harmonic map heat flows. His position is funded by the German
> Research Foundation (DFG) through CRC 1481 "Sparsity and Singular
> Structures" (project no. 442047500), project C01, since October 2024.
> Alongside his research he works part-time as a software developer
> (KoKi, a customer and vehicle management system for Auto-Koch).

Contact: koch@math1.rwth-aachen.de · ORCID: https://orcid.org/0009-0008-4358-9245 · GitHub: https://github.com/KilianKoch

## Pages

- [Research (home)](https://kiliankoch.de/): publications, talks, organized events, funding
- [CV](https://kiliankoch.de/cv): positions, education, teaching experience, awards, skills
- [Software](https://kiliankoch.de/software): the KoKi system and technical highlights
- German version: https://kiliankoch.de/de/ · Japanese version: https://kiliankoch.de/ja/

## Publications

- [Well-posedness of half-harmonic map heat flows for rough initial data](https://doi.org/10.48550/arxiv.2504.06933) (Kilian Koch, Christof Melcher, arXiv 2025, DOI: 10.48550/ARXIV.2504.06933)

## Talks

- "Thresholding Scheme for the Half-Harmonic Map Heat Flow", Young Researchers Workshop on Geometric Analysis, Singular PDEs and Numerics, RWTH Aachen University, 2026-06-01
- "Well-posedness of half-harmonic map heat flows for rough initial data", 3 City Seminar 2025 (invited talk), TU Eindhoven, Netherlands, 2025-10-01

## Organized Events

- Young Researchers Workshop on Geometric Analysis, Singular PDEs and Numerics (Co-organizer), RWTH Aachen University, 2026-06-01 to 2026-06-03
